crime.value: Multiple murders committed by Emily Watson, including strangling her mother and killing other men and women
crime.quote: One day she took her mother by the throat and strangled her to death.

victim.value: Emily's mother and multiple other victims; mother was 'killable' due to her sexual abuse of Emily
victim.quote: Even after the death of her husband the abuse was attempted. Finally, Emily snapped.

culprit_and_motive.value: Emily Watson killed due to psychosis caused by sexual abuse trauma; males reminded her of abuse, women of her mother
culprit_and_motive.quote: psychosis is caused by latent sexual issues in a person Psyche

investigator.value: Alistair, who appears to be consulting with someone knowledgeable about the Emily Watson case
investigator.quote: Good seeing you again Berty. Take care.

red_herring.value: Emily Watson presented as pathological liar and primary killer, but extensive backstory may misdirect from current investigation
red_herring.quote: Emily Watson is a pathological liar

social_world.value: Academic hierarchy with criminology lectures establishing theoretical framework for understanding criminal behavior and justice
social_world.quote: Good morning gentlemen. I trust that all of you had a good night sleep in spite of the Luftwaffe

reveal_mechanic.value: Psychological case study methodology - Freudian analysis revealing sexual abuse as root cause of serial killing pattern
reveal_mechanic.quote: if you believe in Sigman Freud's theory, that psychosis is caused by latent sexual issues

media_and_audience.value: Historical context of WWII London bombing creates backdrop where mental hospital destruction allows patient escape and crimes
media_and_audience.quote: That night a one thousand pound bomb intended to hit the docks in north, London missed the target

investigator_wound.value: Academic investigator seeking understanding through criminological theory rather than direct investigation, possibly avoiding emotional engagement
investigator_wound.quote: Ah excellent. Thank you my good man. You have no idea of how much I need this
